vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-compliant with the visual evidence. P1 (Yellow Pot) and P2/P4 (Black Pot) are present, but P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) is absent from the frame. The scene is dominated by soil-filled containers with no visible vegetative growth.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (No Pothos or Rabbit anchor detected)

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface. No signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: Absent. The expected anchor (White Rabbit) is missing.
plant_audit.P4: Absent. No evidence of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, moist, and undisturbed across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of a metallic spoon (T-4) and a cylindrical object (T-3 to Current) in the yellow pot. No fungal or moss growth observed.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: The soil in the black pot contains scattered white particulate matter (likely crushed eggshells or perlite) which remains static throughout the sequence.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: Removal of the spoon; introduction of a cylindrical object (likely a sensor or marker) into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_current: Static state. No further biological or structural changes observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological dormancy or systemic failure. There are no living plant specimens visible in any of the pots. The environment appears to be a controlled experimental setup for soil or sensor testing rather than an active botanical display.
anomalies: Absence of all registered plant life.
Introduction of non-botanical objects (spoon, sensor/marker) into the pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots serve as containers for soil and, intermittently, non-botanical objects. The environment is stable but devoid of life. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is missing, rendering the scale of the pots difficult to verify against the registry.
